events.name: Minnesota Vikings at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Justin Jefferson bounced back from two quiet games and Greg Joseph made amends for a missed extra point.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings hang on for 28-25 win over Saints in London

headlines.description: — Cooper Rush scrambled to his right, scanning the end zone for a target on a potential go-ahead touchdown.
headlines.shortLinkText: Backup QB Rush wins again as Cowboys beat Commanders 25-10

headlines.description: — Geno Smith and Rashaad Penny were so good the Seattle Seahawks never needed their punter.
headlines.shortLinkText: Geno Smith, Rashaad Penny star as Seahawks beat Lions 48-45

headlines.description: — Derrick Henry got right back to business against the Indianapolis Colts.
headlines.shortLinkText: Henry reigns as Titans hold off Colts for 24-17 victory

events.name: Chicago Bears at New York Giants

headlines.description: — With Daniel Jones limited by an ankle injury and backup Tyrod Taylor down with a concussion midway through the fourth quarter, New York Giants rookie coach Brian Daboll reached for his grease board and went to work.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jones injures ankle in Giants' 20-12 victory over Bears

events.name: New York Jets at Pittsburgh Steelers

headlines.description: — There was no doubt in Zach Wilson's mind. None. And the second-year New York Jets quarterback had no interest in keeping his confidence to himself.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wilson rallies Jets past Pickett, Steelers 24-20

headlines.description: — Josh Allen and the Bills can deal with nasty weather — that's part of the job when you play in Buffalo.
headlines.shortLinkText: 4th-down stop, last-second kick lift Bills past Ravens 23-20

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Houston Texans

headlines.description: — Austin Ekeler was off to a slow start following a 20-touchdown season, and the Chargers believed he was due for a breakout game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ekeler scores 3 touchdowns, Chargers hold off Texans 34-24

headlines.description: — Kyler Murray can’t explain why the Arizona Cardinals continue to start games slowly.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murray has 2 TD passes, 1 rushing; Cards top Panthers 26-16

events.name: New England Patriots at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers rebounded from a dreadful start and helped the Green Bay Packers spoil Bailey Zappe's unexpected NFL debut with the New England Patriots.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rodgers, Crosby's OT FG lead Packers past Pats, Zappe 27-24

events.name: Denver Broncos at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Just when it looked as if the Las Vegas Raiders might blow another fourth-quarter lead, they put the ball in the hands of Josh Jacobs and the running game to finish off the Denver Broncos.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jacobs, defense lead Raiders to 1st win, 32-23 over Broncos

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Patrick Mahomes had all the answers for solving Tampa Bay's stingy defense, winning his latest matchup against Tom Brady in the stadium where the seven-time Super Bowl winner dealt him one of his most disappointing losses.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes throws for 3 TDs, Chiefs overwhelm Buccaneers 41-31
